MINNE lab

Teaching

Rodrigo Moreno teaches the following courses at the Department of Biomedical Engineering and Health Systems at KTH Royal Institute of Technology.

Examiner and course responsible

  • HL2027

    3D Image Reconstruction and Analysis in Medicine

  • CM207V

    Basic Medical Image Visualization

  • CM203V

    Introduction to Medical Image Analysis

  • CM2021

    Magnetic Resonance Imaging

  • CM209V

    Magnetic Resonance Imaging Sequences

  • CM208V

    Magnetic Resonance Imaging Basic Principles

  • CM201V

    Medical Image Registration

  • CM202V

    Medical Image Segmentation

  • CM2006

    Medical Image Visualization

  • CM210V

    Postprocessing in Magnetic Resonance Imaging

  • HL1014

    Clinical Engineering

  • HL1015

    Engineering in Intensive Care and Surgery

  • HL2015

    Quality and Regulatory Aspects on Medical Devices

  • HL1013

    Medical Imaging Systems

Teaching

  • HL205X

    Degree Project in Medical Engineering, Second Cycle

  • CM2016

    Project Carrier Course for Medical Engineers, part 2

  • CM2018

    Statistics for Medical Engineering

  • FCH3101

    Technology and Health

MINNE lab

Research in biomedical imaging and deep learning, at KTH Royal Institute of Technology.
